acceptance_criteria.text: Backend ingestion supports safe document sources.
Document agent produces useful output and feedback version.
proof: UI review showed facts, fields, risks, next questions

acceptance_criteria.text: Generic document agent does not dispatch externally.
System agent config persists through paid access checks.

proof: Console error log empty after Zap import fix
gaps: Wizard click path was not re-run manually in production; fixture creation used smoke script.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
known_gaps: Production browser smoke used a scripted fixture for setup rather than clicking the full wizard manually.
Server disk remains tight because .agent_untracked_backup_20260525 is 7.4G.
